Title: B3. USACO 2024 February Gold / Bessla Motors

Question:
Given a large weighted graph with charging stations, identify all destinations that are reachable from at least K distinct charging stations within the specified range constraint.

root_result_excerpt: I will implement the solution for the USACO 2024 February Gold 'Bessla Motors' problem. The problem requires finding nodes that can reach at least K distinct charging stations within a distance limit. This can be solved using a multi-source Dijkstra-like approach where we maintain the top K closest charging stations for each node.
